---
title: "Useful Commands, packages for flow"
author: "sarah.robertson@ucd.ie"
editor: visual
---

For use in Terminal

git branch: check what branch you're in

git branch Week1: makes new branch Week1

git checkout Week1: switches to new branch week1

git config --global rebase.autoStash true: makes rebase automatic to make it easier to rebase/pull

When unable to push to github: In terminal, use git push -u origin Week1 (or whatever branch you're using)

```{r}
```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{}
```
